div.h3: The next pointer and user data share the same physical address

div.p: Pointer Persistence When in the free list, the first 8 bytes must remain valid to find the next block.
Zero Overhead The user gets the full 64 bytes. No hidden headers or footers.

g.text: typedef struct Node { struct Node* next; } Node;

div.p: The system uses Intrusive pointers. The list metadata only exists while the object is not in use.
